scripts.bench:current: pnpm prebench && BENCH_ROUTER=real-router NODE_OPTIONS='--expose-gc --max-old-space-size=8192' npx tsx core/index.ts
scripts.bench:vs-tanstack:tanstack: pnpm bench:vs-tanstack:build:tanstack && NODE_ENV=production vitest bench --config vs-tanstack/tanstack/react/vite.config.ts vs-tanstack/tanstack/react/speed.bench.ts
scripts.bench:vs-tanstack:flame:tanstack: pnpm bench:vs-tanstack:build:tanstack && NODE_ENV=production npx tsx vs-tanstack/tanstack/react/speed.flame.ts
scripts.bench:vs-tanstack:memory:real-router: pnpm bench:vs-tanstack:build:real-router && NODE_ENV=production NODE_OPTIONS='--expose-gc' npx tsx vs-tanstack/real-router/react/speed.memory.ts
scripts.bench:vs-tanstack:memory:tanstack: pnpm bench:vs-tanstack:build:tanstack && NODE_ENV=production NODE_OPTIONS='--expose-gc' npx tsx vs-tanstack/tanstack/react/speed.memory.ts
scripts.bench:vs-tanstack:memory:real-router:vue: pnpm bench:vs-tanstack:build:real-router:vue && NODE_ENV=production NODE_OPTIONS='--expose-gc' npx tsx vs-tanstack/real-router/vue/speed.memory.ts
scripts.bench:vs-tanstack:memory:real-router:sol: pnpm bench:vs-tanstack:build:real-router:solid && NODE_ENV=production NODE_OPTIONS='--expose-gc' npx tsx vs-tanstack/real-router/solid/speed.memory.ts
scripts.bench:vs-tanstack:tanstack:vue: pnpm bench:vs-tanstack:build:tanstack:vue && NODE_ENV=production vitest bench --config vs-tanstack/tanstack/vue/vite.config.ts vs-tanstack/tanstack/vue/speed.bench.ts
scripts.bench:vs-tanstack:tanstack:solid: pnpm bench:vs-tanstack:build:tanstack:solid && NODE_ENV=production vitest bench --config vs-tanstack/tanstack/solid/vite.config.ts vs-tanstack/tanstack/solid/speed.bench.ts
scripts.bench:vs-tanstack:flame:tanstack:vue: pnpm bench:vs-tanstack:build:tanstack:vue && NODE_ENV=production npx tsx vs-tanstack/tanstack/vue/speed.flame.ts
scripts.bench:vs-tanstack:flame:tanstack:solid: pnpm bench:vs-tanstack:build:tanstack:solid && NODE_ENV=production npx tsx vs-tanstack/tanstack/solid/speed.flame.ts
scripts.bench:vs-tanstack:memory:tanstack:vue: pnpm bench:vs-tanstack:build:tanstack:vue && NODE_ENV=production NODE_OPTIONS='--expose-gc' npx tsx vs-tanstack/tanstack/vue/speed.memory.ts
scripts.bench:vs-tanstack:memory:tanstack:solid: pnpm bench:vs-tanstack:build:tanstack:solid && NODE_ENV=production NODE_OPTIONS='--expose-gc' npx tsx vs-tanstack/tanstack/solid/speed.memory.ts
